bullets: Engine, transmission, and electrical system checks

whyChooseUs.title: Certified Technicians

whyChooseUs.title: Transparent Pricing
whyChooseUs.description: No hidden fees. We provide upfront estimates and explain every repair before work begins.

whyChooseUs.title: Fast Turnaround

whyChooseUs.title: Customer Satisfaction

cta.headline: Ready to Get Your Car Back on the Road?

servicesPage.intro: From routine oil changes to major engine repairs, JC's Automotive offers complete auto repair and maintenance services for all makes and models in Dallas, TX.

services.title: Brake Repair & Replacement
services.shortDescription: Restore stopping power with expert brake service.
services.longDescription: Your brakes are your vehicle's most critical safety system. At JC's Automotive, we inspect, repair, and replace pads, rotors, calipers, and brake lines using premium parts. Whether you hear squeaking or feel vibration, we'll get you stopping safely.
benefits: Enhanced safety for you and your family

process.title: Thorough Inspection
process.description: We check pads, rotors, calipers, lines, and fluid levels.

process.title: Precision Replacement
process.description: We install OEM-quality parts with proper bedding.

process.title: Final Test Drive
process.description: We test brakes at various speeds to ensure perfect operation.

faqs.question: How often should I replace my brake pads?
faqs.answer: Typically every 30,000-70,000 miles depending on driving habits. We'll inspect them during every service.

faqs.question: What causes brake noise?
faqs.answer: Worn pads, glazed rotors, or debris. We'll diagnose the exact cause during inspection.

services.title: Engine Diagnostics & Repair
services.shortDescription: Advanced diagnostics to solve check engine lights and performance issues.
services.longDescription: When your check engine light comes on or your car feels sluggish, bring it to JC's Automotive. Our advanced diagnostic tools read codes and perform live data analysis to pinpoint the problem. From sensor replacements to major engine work, we have you covered.
benefits: Accurate diagnosis saves time and money
Restored engine performance and fuel economy
Prevents minor issues from becoming major

process.title: Code Scan & Analysis
process.description: We read all diagnostic trouble codes and capture live data.

process.title: Systematic Testing
process.description: We test components like sensors, coils, and fuel systems.

process.title: Repair & Verification
process.description: We fix the issue and re-scan to confirm no codes return.

faqs.question: Can you diagnose a check engine light without a dealer?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Our tools are dealer-level and work on all makes and models.

faqs.question: Why is my engine misfiring?
faqs.answer: Common causes include spark plugs, ignition coils, or fuel injectors. We'll isolate the cylinder and fix it.

services.title: Oil Change & Fluid Services
services.shortDescription: Keep your engine healthy with regular oil changes and fluid checks.
services.longDescription: Routine oil changes are the best way to extend engine life. At JC's Automotive, we use high-quality synthetic and conventional oils. We also check and top off all other fluids — coolant, brake fluid, transmission fluid, and more — to keep your car running smoothly.

process.title: Drain & Replace Oil
process.description: We drain old oil and replace with the correct grade and filter.

process.title: Fluid Level Check
process.description: We inspect and top off all critical fluids.

process.title: Multi-Point Inspection
process.description: We check belts, hoses, tires, and lights for your safety.

faqs.question: How often should I get an oil change?
faqs.answer: Most modern cars need oil every 5,000-7,500 miles. We'll recommend the best interval for your vehicle.

faqs.question: Do you use synthetic oil?
faqs.answer: Yes, we offer synthetic and conventional options to match your manufacturer's specs.

services.title: Tire Services & Wheel Alignment
services.shortDescription: Maximize tire life and handling with professional tire care.
services.longDescription: Proper tire maintenance ensures safety, comfort, and fuel efficiency. JC's Automotive offers tire rotation, balancing, mounting, and wheel alignment services. We'll help you choose the right tires for your driving needs and keep them in top shape.
benefits: Even tire wear extends tread life

process.title: Inspection & Pressure Check
process.description: We inspect tread depth, wear patterns, and adjust pressure.

process.title: Rotation & Balancing
process.description: We rotate tires to promote even wear and balance each wheel.

process.title: Precision Alignment
process.description: We adjust camber, caster, and toe to manufacturer specs.

faqs.question: How often should I rotate my tires?
faqs.answer: Every 5,000-7,500 miles, typically with an oil change.

faqs.question: What are signs I need an alignment?
faqs.answer: Pulling to one side, uneven tire wear, or a crooked steering wheel when driving straight.

about.headline: Your Neighborhood Auto Repair Experts Since 2004
about.mission: To provide honest, high-quality auto repair that keeps Dallas drivers safe and moving.
story: JC's Automotive was founded on a simple belief: car repairs shouldn't be a hassle. For over 20 years, we've been serving the Dallas community with transparent service, skilled technicians, and a commitment to doing the job right the first time. What started as a small shop has grown into a trusted destination for drivers across the city.

Our team of ASE-certified mechanics stays up-to-date with the latest automotive technology, from hybrid systems to advanced diagnostics. We treat every car like it's our own, and every customer like a neighbor. Whether it's a quick oil change or a complex engine repair, you can count on JC's Automotive for quality work and fair prices.

coreValues.title: Integrity
coreValues.description: We never recommend unnecessary repairs. Our estimates are honest and detailed.

coreValues.title: Quality
coreValues.description: We use only high-quality parts and back our work with a solid warranty.

coreValues.title: Community
coreValues.description: We're proud to serve Dallas and support local events and causes.

coreValues.title: Reliability
coreValues.description: We deliver on time, every time, so you can get back on the road.

contact.headline: Get in Touch with JC's Automotive
contact.subheadline: Schedule your appointment today or stop by — we're ready to help.
